meta.description: Hourly: list pending agency approvals via MCP; if any, raise an IN-APP notification for the ops lead via the hub `notify` tool (no external channel). Scoped identity wf:stale-approval-chaser -> [agency.pendingApprovals, notify] (notify is a LOW write; the service account is a manager). Env: HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, NOTIFY_USER_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "agency.pendingApprovals", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "notify", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID, recipientId: $env.NOTIFY_USER_ID, type: "approvals_pending", payload: { count: $json.count, subjects: $json.subjects } } } }) }}
